---
title: "Tx_DT_calling"
author: "Dipankor Dhrubo"
date: "2025-12-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}

# ---- segment preparation ----
## The main part


## Preparing the main file

NSCLC_metadata<- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLC_metadata.rds")
Normalized_timeline <- read_csv("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Function_files/Normalized_timeline.csv")
Refined_timeline<- read_csv("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Function_files/Refined_intervals.csv")
Cluster_surv<- read_csv("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Function_files/Cluster_survival_NSCLC.csv")

## Minor tweaking of the file

full_df <- Normalized_timeline %>%
  left_join(
    NSCLC_metadata %>%
      select(sample, Normalize_Candida, diagsurvtime, Sex, BMI, SmokingStatus, Histology),
    by = "sample"
  ) %>% unique()


Cluster_surv_2<- Cluster_surv %>% left_join(full_df %>% select(sample,Stage,Sex,BMI,Histology) %>% unique(),by="sample")
Cluster_surv_2<- Cluster_surv_2 %>% left_join(NSCLC_metadata %>% 
                                                select(sample,Age,ProgRecurInd,SmokingStatus) %>% unique(), by= "sample")
Cluster_surv_2 <- Cluster_surv_2 %>%
  mutate(
    SmokingStatus = case_when(
      str_detect(tolower(SmokingStatus), "never") ~ "Never",
      str_detect(tolower(SmokingStatus), "former|ever") ~ "Former",
      str_detect(tolower(SmokingStatus), "current|active") ~ "Current",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

Cluster_surv_2<- Cluster_surv_2 %>% mutate(Stage= ifelse(Stage %in% c("I","II"), "Early","Advanced"))

```


```{r}

### Supportive and builder functions 

tx_cols <- c(
  Ancillary      = "#E1BE6A",
  Chemo          = "#FDB863",
  Hormone        = "#DC267F",
  IO             = "#2CA02C",
  Small_Molecule = "#76B7B2",
  Targeted       = "#4E79A7",
  Radiation      = "#6A51A3",
  Others         = "#8C8C8C"
)

# make sure ALL of these are allowed focus types
valid_types <- c(
  "Ancillary","Chemo","Hormone","IO",
  "Small_Molecule","Targeted","Radiation","Others"
)

 
 ca_cols <- c(High = "#F28E2B", Low = "#56B4E9")
 valid_types <- names(tx_cols)[names(tx_cols) != "None"]
 k_label <- function(kc) sub("^Cluster_k(\\d+)$", "k\\1", kc)
 
 # -------- segments -> canonical types --------
 prep_segs <- function(segs, horizon_years = 5) {
   stopifnot("sample" %in% names(segs),
             "type"   %in% names(segs),
             "start_year" %in% names(segs),
             "end_year"   %in% names(segs))
   
   segs %>%
     dplyr::mutate(type_raw = as.character(.data$type)) %>%      # step 1: create type_raw
     dplyr::mutate(                                              # step 2: recode type
       type = dplyr::case_when(
         stringr::str_detect(.data$type_raw, stringr::regex("radiation|\\brt\\b|xrt|imrt|sbrt|radiother", TRUE)) ~ "Radiation",
         stringr::str_detect(.data$type_raw, stringr::regex("\\bio\\b|immuno|pembro|nivol|atezo|ipi|pd-1|pd-l1|ctla", TRUE)) ~ "IO",
         stringr::str_detect(.data$type_raw, stringr::regex("chemo|chemotherapy|platin|taxel|5fu|gemcitabine|doxo", TRUE)) ~ "Chemo",
         stringr::str_detect(.data$type_raw, stringr::regex("target|tki|inhibitor|egfr|alk|braf|mek|parp|her2|trast", TRUE)) ~ "Targeted",
         stringr::str_detect(.data$type_raw, stringr::regex("hormone|endocrine|androgen|estrogen|tamox|abiraterone|enzalu|aromatase|letro|anastro|fulves", TRUE)) ~ "Hormone",
         # new class replacing OncoDrug:
         stringr::str_detect(.data$type_raw, stringr::regex("small[ _-]?molecule|onco.?drug|oncodrug", TRUE)) ~ "Small_Molecule",stringr::str_detect(type_raw, stringr::regex("ancillary|support|palliat|pain control|bisphosphonate", TRUE)) ~ "Ancillary",
         TRUE ~ "Others"
       ),
       t0 = pmax(0, pmin(.data$start_year, horizon_years)),
       t1 = pmax(0, pmin(.data$end_year,   horizon_years))
     ) %>%
     dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$sample), !is.na(.data$t0), !is.na(.data$t1), .data$t1 > .data$t0)
 }
 # -------- per-sample durations & shares (for all valid types) --------
 treatment_shares <- function(segs_prepped) {
   wide <- segs_prepped %>%
     group_by(sample, type) %>%
     summarise(dur = sum(t1 - t0), .groups = "drop") %>%
     tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = type, values_from = dur, values_fill = 0)
   
   # ensure all treatment columns exist
   for (nm in c(valid_types, "None")) if (!nm %in% names(wide)) wide[[nm]] <- 0
   
   wide %>%
     mutate(
       dur_all     = rowSums(across(c(valid_types, "None"))),
       dur_treated = rowSums(across(all_of(valid_types))),
       # shares among treated time for every type
       across(all_of(valid_types),
              ~ ifelse(dur_treated > 0, .x / dur_treated, 0),
              .names = "share_{col}_tx")
     ) %>%
     mutate(
       # dominant treated-time type across all valid types
       dom_type_tx = {
         shares <- as.matrix(select(., starts_with("share_"), ends_with("_tx")))
         colnames(shares) <- gsub("^share_|_tx$", "", colnames(shares))
         valid_types[pmax(col(shares)[max.col(shares, ties.method = "first")], 1)]
       }
     )
 }
 
 # -------- KM with optional risk table --------
 km_panel_from_df <- function(
    df, group_col="CAlevel", title="", horizon_years=NULL,
    risk_table=TRUE, risk_times=NULL, risk_table_height=0.28, risk_text_size=4,
    # NEW styling knobs
    base_size = 16,
    title_size = 22,
    axis_title_size = 14,
    axis_text_size  = 12,
    legend_title_size = 14,
    legend_text_size  = 12,
    bold = TRUE
 ){
   stopifnot(all(c("diagsurvtime","status",group_col) %in% names(df)))
   norm <- c("high"="High","High"="High","low"="Low","Low"="Low","HIGH"="High","LOW"="Low")
   df[[group_col]] <- norm[tolower(df[[group_col]])]
   df <- df %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[group_col]]))
   df[[group_col]] <- factor(df[[group_col]], levels = c("High","Low"))
   
   if (dplyr::n_distinct(df[[group_col]]) < 2) {
     return(
       ggplot() + annotate("text", x=.5, y=.5, label="Only one CA group in subset", size=5) +
         labs(title = title, x="Years", y="Survival") + theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
     )
   }
   
   form <- as.formula(paste("Surv(diagsurvtime, status) ~", group_col))
   fit  <- survfit(form, data = df)
   td   <- broom::tidy(fit); td$group <- sub(".*=", "", td$strata); td$group <- factor(td$group, levels=c("High","Low"))
   
   # make sure we start at time 0 at S=1
   if (!any(td$time == 0 & td$group == "High")) td <- bind_rows(tibble(time=0, estimate=1, conf.low=1, conf.high=1, strata=paste0(group_col,"=High"), n.risk=NA, n.event=NA, n.censor=NA, group=factor("High", c("High","Low"))), td)
   if (!any(td$time == 0 & td$group == "Low"))  td <- bind_rows(tibble(time=0, estimate=1, conf.low=1, conf.high=1, strata=paste0(group_col,"=Low"),  n.risk=NA, n.event=NA, n.censor=NA, group=factor("Low",  c("High","Low"))), td)
   td <- td %>% arrange(group, time)
   
   lr   <- survdiff(form, data = df)
   pval <- if (is.finite(lr$chisq)) pchisq(lr$chisq, df = 1, lower.tail = FALSE) else NA_real_
   
   km <- ggplot2::ggplot(td, ggplot2::aes(x=time, y=estimate, colour=group, fill=group)) +
     ggplot2::geom_ribbon(ggplot2::aes(ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), alpha=.20, linewidth=0) +
     ggplot2::geom_step(linewidth=1.1) +
     ggplot2::scale_colour_manual(values=ca_cols, drop=FALSE) +
     ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values=ca_cols, drop=FALSE) +
     ggplot2::labs(x="Years", y="Survival", title=title,
                   subtitle=sprintf("CA grouping: provided | log-rank p = %s",
                                    ifelse(is.na(pval), "NA", signif(pval, 3)))) +
     ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
     ggplot2::theme(
       legend.position = "right",
       text            = ggplot2::element_text(face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"),
       plot.title      = ggplot2::element_text(size = title_size),
       axis.title      = ggplot2::element_text(size = axis_title_size),
       axis.text       = ggplot2::element_text(size = axis_text_size),
       legend.title    = ggplot2::element_text(size = legend_title_size),
       legend.text     = ggplot2::element_text(size = legend_text_size)
     )
   if (!is.null(horizon_years)) km <- km + coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, horizon_years))
   
   if (!risk_table) return(km)
   
   if (is.null(risk_times)) risk_times <- if (!is.null(horizon_years)) 0:horizon_years else pretty(range(df$diagsurvtime, na.rm = TRUE), n=6)
   sm <- summary(fit, times = risk_times, extend = TRUE)
   rt <- tibble(time = sm$time, group = sub(".*=", "", as.character(sm$strata)), n_risk = sm$n.risk)
   rt$group <- factor(rt$group, levels=c("High","Low"))
   
   risk <- ggplot(rt, aes(x=time, y=group, label=n_risk, colour=group)) +
     geom_text(size=risk_text_size, show.legend=FALSE) +
     scale_colour_manual(values=ca_cols, drop=FALSE) +
     scale_x_continuous(breaks = risk_times, limits = range(risk_times)) +
     labs(x=NULL, y="At risk") +
     theme_minimal(base_size=11) +
     theme(panel.grid.major.y=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor=element_blank(), legend.position="none")
   
   (km + theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(), axis.text.x=element_blank(), axis.ticks.x=element_blank())) /
     risk + plot_layout(heights = c(1, risk_table_height))
 }
 
 ## Helper function
 # Does `pattern` appear as a contiguous subsequence of `seq`?
has_subseq <- function(seq, pattern) {
  seq     <- as.character(seq)
  pattern <- as.character(pattern)
  n <- length(seq)
  m <- length(pattern)
  if (m == 0L) return(TRUE)
  if (m > n)  return(FALSE)
  for (i in seq_len(n - m + 1L)) {
    if (all(seq[i:(i + m - 1L)] == pattern)) return(TRUE)
  }
  FALSE
}

 
 # -------- timeline plot (shows all available types) --------
 timeline_panel <- function(
  segs_prepped, share_df, twin_ids,
  title = "Top twins",
  horizon_years = 5,
  base_size = 16, title_size = 22, axis_title_size = 14, axis_text_size = 12,
  legend_title_size = 14, legend_text_size = 12, bold = TRUE
){
  # restrict to selected twins and attach shares
  segs_plot <- segs_prepped %>%
    dplyr::semi_join(tibble::tibble(sample = twin_ids), by = "sample") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      share_df %>% dplyr::select(sample, starts_with("share_"), dur_treated),
      by = "sample"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      # order samples by (e.g.) Radiation share, as before
      sample = forcats::fct_reorder(
        sample,
        !!rlang::sym("share_Radiation_tx"),
        .desc = TRUE
      ),
      sample_idx = as.numeric(sample),  # numeric index for plotting
      type      = factor(type, levels = names(tx_cols)),
      type_idx  = as.numeric(type)
    )
used_types <- intersect(
  names(tx_cols),
  unique(as.character(segs_plot$type))
)
  # vertical offset per treatment type (keeps them close to label line)
  offset_scale <- 0.10
  segs_plot <- segs_plot %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      y_pos = sample_idx + (type_idx - mean(type_idx)) * offset_scale
    )

  # breaks at the "base" positions (integer indices), labels = sample IDs
  y_breaks <- sort(unique(segs_plot$sample_idx))
  y_labels <- levels(segs_plot$sample)

  ggplot2::ggplot(segs_plot) +
    ggplot2::geom_segment(
      ggplot2::aes(
        x    = t0,
        xend = t1,
        y    = y_pos,
        yend = y_pos,
        colour = type
      ),
      linewidth = 1
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_colour_manual(
  values = tx_cols[used_types],
  breaks = used_types,
  drop   = FALSE,
  name   = "Treatment Type"
) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(0, horizon_years),
      breaks = 0:horizon_years,
      name   = "Years since first treatment"
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = y_breaks,
      labels = y_labels,
      name   = "Twin sample"
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = title) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      text            = ggplot2::element_text(
        face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"
      ),
      plot.title      = ggplot2::element_text(size = title_size),
      axis.title      = ggplot2::element_text(size = axis_title_size),
      axis.text       = ggplot2::element_text(size = axis_text_size),
      legend.title    = ggplot2::element_text(size = legend_title_size),
      legend.text     = ggplot2::element_text(size = legend_text_size)
    )
}

 
 # -------- forest (same as your latest; keeps Age/Stage/Sex/BMI) --------
 cox_forest_plot_from_df <- function(
    df,
    covars = c("CAlevel","Stage","Sex","BMI","Age"),
    ref_levels = list(CAlevel="Low", Stage="Early"),
    title = "Adjusted Cox — twins only",
    min_epv = 5,
    priority = c("CAlevel","Age","Stage","Sex","BMI"),
    numeric_scale = list(Age = 10),
    numeric_units = list(Age = "years"),
    numeric_pretty = list(Age = "Age at diagnosis"),
    # NEW styling knobs
    base_size = 16,
    title_size = 22,
    axis_title_size = 14,
    axis_text_size  = 12,
    bold = TRUE
 ){
   need <- unique(c("sample","diagsurvtime","status", covars))
   if (length(setdiff(need, names(df)))) {
     miss <- paste(setdiff(need, names(df)), collapse=", ")
     return(
       ggplot2::ggplot() +
         ggplot2::annotate("text", x=.5, y=.5, label=paste("Missing:", miss)) +
         ggplot2::labs(title=title) +
         ggplot2::theme_void(base_size = base_size) +
         ggplot2::theme(text = ggplot2::element_text(face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"),
                        plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = title_size))
     )
   }
   
   d0 <- df[, need, drop=FALSE]
   for (nm in names(ref_levels)) if (!is.null(ref_levels[[nm]]) && nm %in% names(d0)) {
     d0[[nm]] <- factor(d0[[nm]]); if (ref_levels[[nm]] %in% levels(d0[[nm]])) d0[[nm]] <- stats::relevel(d0[[nm]], ref=ref_levels[[nm]])
   }
   safe_num <- function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))
   for (nm in intersect(c("BMI","Age"), names(d0))) if (!is.numeric(d0[[nm]])) d0[[nm]] <- safe_num(d0[[nm]])
   for (nm in names(numeric_scale)) if (nm %in% names(d0) && is.numeric(d0[[nm]]) && numeric_scale[[nm]]>0) d0[[nm]] <- d0[[nm]]/numeric_scale[[nm]]
   
   d <- stats::na.omit(d0); n <- nrow(d); ev <- sum(d$status==1, na.rm=TRUE)
   if (n < 10 || ev < 3) {
     return(
       ggplot2::ggplot() +
         ggplot2::annotate("text", x=.5, y=.6, label=sprintf("n=%d, events=%d", n, ev)) +
         ggplot2::annotate("text", x=.5, y=.4, label="Too few complete cases") +
         ggplot2::labs(title=title) +
         ggplot2::theme_void(base_size = base_size) +
         ggplot2::theme(text = ggplot2::element_text(face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"),
                        plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = title_size))
     )
   }
   
   varies <- function(v){ x <- d[[v]]; if (is.numeric(x)) var(x, na.rm=TRUE)>0 else dplyr::n_distinct(x)>1 }
   cov_keep <- covars[sapply(covars, varies)]; if (!length(cov_keep)) cov_keep <- "CAlevel"
   param_count <- function(v) if (is.numeric(d[[v]])) 1L else max(1L, dplyr::n_distinct(d[[v]])-1L)
   max_params <- max(1L, floor(ev/min_epv))
   cov_keep <- unique(c(intersect(priority, cov_keep), setdiff(cov_keep, priority)))
   pick <- character(0); used <- 0L
   for (v in cov_keep) { pv <- as.integer(param_count(v)); if (v=="CAlevel" || used+pv<=max_params) { pick <- c(pick,v); used <- used+pv } }
   if (!"CAlevel" %in% pick) pick <- c("CAlevel", setdiff(pick, "CAlevel"))
   
   fit_ok <- FALSE; used_cov <- pick
   while (!fit_ok && length(used_cov)) {
     form <- as.formula(paste("survival::Surv(diagsurvtime, status) ~", paste(used_cov, collapse=" + ")))
     fit  <- try(survival::coxph(form, data=d, ties="efron"), silent=TRUE)
     fit_ok <- !inherits(fit, "try-error"); if (!fit_ok) used_cov <- head(used_cov, -1)
   }
   if (!fit_ok) { used_cov <- "CAlevel"; fit <- survival::coxph(survival::Surv(diagsurvtime, status) ~ CAlevel, data=d, ties="efron") }
   
   tt <- broom::tidy(fit, exponentiate=TRUE, conf.int=TRUE)
   if (!nrow(tt)) {
     return(
       ggplot2::ggplot() +
         ggplot2::annotate("text", x=.5, y=.5, label="No estimable coefficients") +
         ggplot2::labs(title=title) +
         ggplot2::theme_void(base_size = base_size) +
         ggplot2::theme(text = ggplot2::element_text(face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"),
                        plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = title_size))
     )
   }
   
   pretty_term <- function(term){
     for (v in used_cov) if (startsWith(term, v)) {
       suf <- gsub("^[:.=]", "", sub(paste0("^", v), "", term))
       if (suf=="") {
         if (v %in% names(numeric_scale)) {
           nm <- if (!is.null(numeric_pretty[[v]])) numeric_pretty[[v]] else gsub("_"," ", v)
           unit <- if (!is.null(numeric_units[[v]])) numeric_units[[v]] else "units"
           return(sprintf("%s (per %s %s)", nm, numeric_scale[[v]], unit))
         } else return(v)
       } else {
         ref <- NULL; if (v %in% names(ref_levels) && !is.null(ref_levels[[v]])) ref <- paste0(" (ref=", ref_levels[[v]], ")")
         return(paste0(v, ": ", suf, ifelse(is.null(ref), "", ref)))
       }
     }
     term
   }
   tt$label <- vapply(tt$term, pretty_term, character(1))
   tt <- tt %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(estimate)) %>%
     dplyr::mutate(label=factor(label, levels=rev(unique(label))))
   
   xr <- range(tt$conf.low, tt$conf.high, na.rm=TRUE); if (!all(is.finite(xr))) xr <- c(0.5,2)
   xpad <- exp(log(xr) + c(-0.25,0.25))
   
   ggplot2::ggplot(tt, ggplot2::aes(y=label, x=estimate)) +
     ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept=1, linetype=2) +
     ggplot2::geom_errorbarh(ggplot2::aes(xmin=conf.low, xmax=conf.high), height=0.2, linewidth=1) +
     ggplot2::geom_point(size=3) +
     ggplot2::scale_x_log10(limits=xpad) +
     ggplot2::labs(x="Hazard Ratio (log scale)", y=NULL, title=title,
                   subtitle=sprintf("complete cases n=%d (of %d twins), events=%d; covars used: %s",
                                    n, nrow(df), ev, paste(used_cov, collapse=", "))) +
     ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
     ggplot2::theme(
       text        = ggplot2::element_text(face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"),
       plot.title  = ggplot2::element_text(size = title_size),
       axis.title  = ggplot2::element_text(size = axis_title_size),
       axis.text   = ggplot2::element_text(size = axis_text_size)
     )
 }
 
```

 
 
```{r} 
 # -------- orchestrator: focus on user-selected treatment types --------
tx_focus_dt <- function(
  Cluster_surv, segs,
  kc = "Cluster_k14", cl = NULL,
  focus_types   = c("Radiation"),
  group_col     = "CAlevel",
  horizon_years = 5,
  n_twins       = 20,
  min_share_tx  = 0.33,
  
  # sequence options
  enforce_sequence = FALSE,
  seq_pattern      = NULL,
  sequence_strict  = FALSE,
  
  
  # NEW: how to treat the *start* of treatment
  # "all"         = no restriction
  # "single_only" = first_t0 must have exactly 1 type (no combo)
  # "combo_only"  = first_t0 must have >=2 focus types (e.g. Chemo+IO)
  start_filter = c("all", "single_only", "combo_only"),
  pure_focus_only  = FALSE,
  
  # forest controls
  add_forest  = TRUE,
  cox_covars  = c("CAlevel","Stage","Sex","BMI","Age","SmokingStatus","ProgRecurInd"),
  cox_ref_levels = list(CAlevel="Low", Stage="Early",
                        SmokingStatus = "Never", ProgRecurInd="No"),
  forest_min_epv = 1,
  forest_priority = c("CAlevel","Age","Stage","Sex","BMI",
                      "SmokingStatus","ProgRecurInd"),
  forest_numeric_scale = list(Age = 5),
  forest_numeric_units = list(Age = "years"),
  forest_drop_stage_unknown   = FALSE,
  forest_stage_unknown_levels = c("Unknown","Unknown/Not Applicable","Not Applicable"),
  
  # KM risk table
  km_risk_table        = TRUE,
  km_risk_table_height = 0.26,
  show_km_legend       = FALSE,
  
  # styling
  base_size  = 14,
  title_size = 16,
  widths     = c(1.4, 1, 1)
){
  # ---- arg matching & basic checks ----
  start_filter <- match.arg(start_filter)
  km_on <- "twins"
  
  focus_types <- intersect(focus_types, valid_types)
  stopifnot(length(focus_types) >= 1)
  
  # ---- prep & shares ----
  segs_prep <- prep_segs(segs, horizon_years = horizon_years)
  share_df  <- treatment_shares(segs_prep)
  
  # ---- build per-sample sequences & first-time info ----
  seq_tbl <- segs_prep %>%
    dplyr::arrange(sample, t0) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      # collapsed treatment path (Chemo, Chemo, IO → Chemo, IO)
      tx_seq = list({
        v <- as.character(type)
        rle(v)$values
      }),
      # named vector of first t0 per type
      first_time = list({
        sp <- split(t0, type)
        vapply(sp, min, numeric(1))
      }),
      first_t0    = min(t0),
      types_first = list(unique(type[t0 == first_t0])),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # default sequence pattern: use focus_types in given order
  if (enforce_sequence && is.null(seq_pattern)) {
    seq_pattern <- focus_types
  }
  
  # ---- choose cluster if not given: max median focus share ----
  if (is.null(cl)) {
    cl <- Cluster_surv %>%
      dplyr::select(sample, cluster = .data[[kc]]) %>%
      dplyr::left_join(share_df, by = "sample") %>%
      dplyr::group_by(cluster) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        med_focus = median(
          rowSums(
            dplyr::across(all_of(paste0("share_", focus_types, "_tx")))
          ),
          na.rm = TRUE
        ),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(med_focus)) %>%
      dplyr::slice_head(n = 1) %>%
      dplyr::pull(cluster)
  }
  
  # ---- restrict to chosen cluster ----
  df_cl <- Cluster_surv %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data[[kc]] == cl)
  
  # ---- candidate twin set ----
  cand <- df_cl %>%
    dplyr::select(sample) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(share_df, by = "sample") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(seq_tbl,  by = "sample") %>%   # adds tx_seq, first_time, first_t0, types_first
    dplyr::mutate(
      # total focus-type share
      focus_share_tx = rowSums(
        dplyr::across(all_of(paste0("share_", focus_types, "_tx"))),
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      
      
      # ANY combo at start: more than one distinct type at first_t0
      combo_start_any = vapply(
        types_first,
        function(tt) length(unique(tt)) >= 2L,
        logical(1)
      ),
      
      # combo of FOCUS types at start (for "combo_only" mode)
      combo_focus_start = vapply(
        types_first,
        function(tt) {
          tt <- as.character(tt)
          sum(tt %in% focus_types) >= 2L
        },
        logical(1)
      ),
      
      only_focus_types = vapply(
      tx_seq,
      function(v) all(as.character(v) %in% focus_types),
      logical(1)
    ),
      # sequence OK?
      seq_ok = if (!enforce_sequence || is.null(seq_pattern)) {
        TRUE
      } else if (!sequence_strict) {
        vapply(tx_seq, has_subseq, logical(1), pattern = seq_pattern)
      } else {
        vapply(first_time, function(ft) {
          times <- ft[seq_pattern]
          if (any(is.na(times)))    return(FALSE)
          if (anyDuplicated(times)) return(FALSE)
          all(diff(times) > 0)
        }, logical(1))
      }
    ) %>%
    dplyr::  filter(
    dur_treated > 0,
    seq_ok,
    case_when(
      start_filter == "all"         ~ TRUE,
      start_filter == "single_only" ~ !combo_start_any,
      start_filter == "combo_only"  ~ combo_focus_start,
      TRUE                          ~ TRUE
    ),
    if (pure_focus_only) only_focus_types else TRUE
  ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(
      dplyr::desc(focus_share_tx),
      dplyr::desc(dur_treated)
    )
  
  # ---- dominance filter (always applied) ----
  sel <- cand %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      dom_type_tx %in% focus_types,
      focus_share_tx >= min_share_tx
    ) %>%
    dplyr::pull(sample) %>%
    unique()
  
  # ---- relax focus_share threshold if not enough twins ----
  thr <- min_share_tx
  while (length(sel) < min(n_twins, nrow(cand)) && thr > 0) {
    thr <- thr - 0.05
    add <- cand %>%
      dplyr::filter(focus_share_tx >= thr) %>%
      dplyr::pull(sample)
    sel <- unique(c(sel, add))
  }
  if (length(sel) < min(n_twins, nrow(cand))) {
    sel <- unique(c(sel, cand$sample))
  }
  twin_ids <- head(sel, min(n_twins, nrow(cand)))
  
  df_twins <- df_cl %>%
    dplyr::semi_join(tibble::tibble(sample = twin_ids), by = "sample")
  focus_label <- paste(focus_types, collapse = "+")
  
  # helper to apply sizes to any ggplot
  apply_sizes <- function(p) {
    p + ggplot2::theme(
      text       = ggplot2::element_text(size = base_size),
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = title_size, face = "bold")
    )
  }
  
  # ---- panels ----
  p_timeline <- timeline_panel(
    segs_prep, share_df, twin_ids,
    title = sprintf(
      "Top-%d twins (%s focus) in %s cl%s",
      length(twin_ids), focus_label, k_label(kc), cl
    ),
    horizon_years = horizon_years
  ) |> apply_sizes()
  
  p_km <- km_panel_from_df(
    df_twins, group_col = group_col,
    title = sprintf(
      "KM in %s (cluster %s) — twins only (n=%d, focus=%s)",
      k_label(kc), cl, length(twin_ids), focus_label
    ),
    horizon_years      = horizon_years,
    risk_table         = km_risk_table,
    risk_times         = 0:horizon_years,
    risk_table_height  = km_risk_table_height
  ) |> apply_sizes()
  
  if (!show_km_legend) {
    p_km <- p_km + ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none")
  }
  
  if (add_forest) {
    df_forest <- df_twins
    if (forest_drop_stage_unknown && "Stage" %in% names(df_forest)) {
      df_forest <- df_forest %>%
        dplyr::mutate(Stage = as.character(Stage)) %>%
        dplyr::filter(!is.na(Stage), !(Stage %in% forest_stage_unknown_levels))
      if (nrow(df_forest)) {
        df_forest$Stage <- factor(df_forest$Stage)
        if (!is.null(cox_ref_levels$Stage) &&
            cox_ref_levels$Stage %in% levels(df_forest$Stage)) {
          df_forest$Stage <- stats::relevel(df_forest$Stage, ref = cox_ref_levels$Stage)
        }
      }
    }
    
    p_forest <- cox_forest_plot_from_df(
      df_forest,
      covars        = cox_covars,
      ref_levels    = cox_ref_levels,
      title         = sprintf(
        "Adjusted Cox — twins only (focus=%s%s)",
        focus_label,
        if (forest_drop_stage_unknown) ", Stage unknown excluded" else ""
      ),
      min_epv       = forest_min_epv,
      priority      = forest_priority,
      numeric_scale = forest_numeric_scale,
      numeric_units = forest_numeric_units
    ) |> apply_sizes()
  } else {
    p_forest <- ggplot2::ggplot() +
      ggplot2::theme_void() +
      ggplot2::labs(title = "Forest (omitted)") |>
      apply_sizes()
  }
  
  # ---- compose in one row ----
  p_row <- (p_timeline | p_km | p_forest) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(widths = widths, guides = "keep")
  
  attr(p_row, "twin_ids") <- twin_ids
  p_row
}



 # -----------------------
 # Example calls
 # -----------------------
 
 Demo <- tx_focus_dt(
  Cluster_surv_2, Refined_timeline,
  kc = "Cluster_k19", cl = 15,
  focus_types  = c("Chemo","IO"),
  n_twins      = 20,
  min_share_tx = 0.33,
  start_filter = "combo_only" ,
  enforce_sequence = F,
  sequence_strict = F
)

ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Function_figs/demo_1.png", p_io, width = 40, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```
